description_long: This is a modern tropical house complex situated on a sandy, landscaped plot surrounded by dense greenery and palm trees. The main building is rectangular with a flat roof and large windows, complemented by several smaller circular and rectangular structures scattered around the property. Two overwater bungalows are connected to the main island by a wooden pier, adding a resort-like feel. The property features a swimming pool, visible near the main house, and multiple shaded seating areas with thatched roofs. The landscaping is lush, with a mix of tall palms, shrubs, and manicured pathways. The overall design emphasizes open space, natural materials, and integration with the surrounding environment.
description: A modern tropical house complex with a flat-roofed main building, lush landscaping, overwater bungalows, and a swimming pool, all set on a sandy plot with palm trees.
description_view_0: View 0 shows the main house surrounded by dense greenery, with the overwater bungalows and pier visible in the background.
description_view_1: View 1 highlights the front facade of the main house, the lush landscaping, and the arrangement of circular shaded seating areas.
description_view_2: View 2 provides a clear look at the flat roof of the main house, the swimming pool, and the pier leading to the overwater bungalows.
description_view_3: View 3 emphasizes the overwater bungalows, the pier, and the arrangement of shaded seating areas along the sandy perimeter.
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway features a wide, open design with large glass doors, minimal steps, and a covered porch area integrated into the landscaping.
